allOf.description: A reference to an object that represents a virtual gateway's client's Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate.
Whether the policy is enforced. The default is True, if a value isn't specified.
One or more ports that the policy is enforced for.
A reference to an object that represents a Transport Layer Security (TLS) validation context.

description: An object that represents a Transport Layer Security (TLS) client policy.
title: VirtualGatewayClientPolicyTls
